name: BalCustSvcRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TrgtSys}' AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSys}' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SubjCd}' AND ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' AND CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'Y', T.CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO <= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' AND T.CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N';

Annotations:
Job Name:
BalProvRunCycUpd_EE

Balancing Customer Service Row To Row and Column Sum Update for P_RUN_CYC table
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Customer Service with a value \"N\" in the  ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN and CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table with Balancing Indicators set to 'Y' to indicate source system data has been balanced with respect to IDS for each of the run cycles processed.
